_meta.purpose: Engagement phases on the homepage (// SYS.06 > MISSION_PHASES).

section.heading: Low-risk by design. No black box.

phases.title: Intro call
phases.description: 20 minutes to scope your problem and see if it's a fit. Free, no obligation.

phases.title: Proposal & scope
phases.description: Fixed scope, timeline, and price up front. You know exactly what you're getting.

phases.title: Build in the open
phases.description: Weekly demos, a direct line to me, no black box. You see progress every week.

phases.title: Ship & handoff
phases.description: Tested, documented, working. Handed back to your team. No lock-in.
